name: Rassogolla (Cheese Balls in Syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the paneer and ricotta cheese with your palm until smooth and creamy.
2. Divide the mixture into 16 balls.
3. Bring sugar and water to a boil over medium heat.
4. Place the cheese balls in the syrup and boil for 40 minutes.
5. Cover and continue boiling for another 30 minutes.
6. Serve warm or cold.
(Note: PANEER is homemade cottage cheese made by boiling milk, adding about 250 ml of warm water, and 5 tbsp white vinegar to curdle the milk.)
